column1: # Team statistical profile for WC 2026 group stage + recent qualifiers
# attack_strength: goals scored / league_avg_goals (normalized to 1.0 = average)
# defense_strength: goals conceded / league_avg_goals (lower = better defense; 1.0 = average)
# xg_for: average xG per game (attacking quality)
# xg_against: average xG conceded per game (defensive quality)
# wc_appearances: number of World Cup appearances
# ko_win_rate: % of knockout round games won (all-time WC)
# penalty_ko_rate: % of penalty shootouts won in WC
# rest_days_before_qf: days rest before their QF match (from R16 game)
